---
title: "LLMs & Agentic AI for PMs"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
          body {
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #0D0F1A;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
          }
          /* Mesh background */
          body::before {
            content: '';
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background:
              radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 20% 20%, rgba(124,58,237,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%),
              radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 80% 80%, rgba(6,182,212,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
              radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 50% 50%, rgba(16,185,129,0.04) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
          }
          .landing {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 2rem;
            max-width: 720px;
            width: 100%;
          }
          .badge {
            display: inline-block;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #7C3AED;
            border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.4);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 0.35em 1em;
            margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
            background: rgba(124,58,237,0.08);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
          }
          h1 {
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.2rem);
            font-weight: 900;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
            line-height: 1.1;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED 0%, #06B6D4 55%, #10B981 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
          }
          .subtitle {
            font-size: 1rem;
            color: #94A3B8;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
          }
          .audience {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.12em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #7C3AED;
            opacity: 0.8;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
          }
          .lang-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.2rem;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
          }
          .lang-btn {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.8rem;
            padding: 1.2rem 2.4rem;
            border-radius: 16px;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.01em;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            overflow: hidden;
          }
          .lang-btn::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
          }
          .lang-btn:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
          }
          .lang-btn:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
          .lang-btn .flag {
            font-size: 1.6rem;
            line-height: 1;
          }
          .lang-btn .label {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            text-align: left;
          }
          .lang-btn .lang-code {
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 800;
          }
          .lang-btn .lang-name {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            opacity: 0.8;
          }
          /* FR button */
          .btn-fr {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(124,58,237,0.15), rgba(124,58,237,0.05));
            border: 1.5px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.5);
            color: #F1F5F9;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(124,58,237,0.15);
          }
          .btn-fr::before {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(124,58,237,0.25), rgba(124,58,237,0.08));
          }
          .btn-fr:hover {
            border-color: rgba(124,58,237,0.9);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(124,58,237,0.3);
          }
          /* EN button */
          .btn-en {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(6,182,212,0.12), rgba(6,182,212,0.04));
            border: 1.5px solid rgba(6,182,212,0.4);
            color: #F1F5F9;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(6,182,212,0.1);
          }
          .btn-en::before {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(6,182,212,0.22), rgba(6,182,212,0.06));
          }
          .btn-en:hover {
            border-color: rgba(6,182,212,0.9);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(6,182,212,0.25);
          }
          .divider {
            width: 60px;
            height: 1px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.12), transparent);
            margin: 0.5rem auto 1.5rem;
          }
          .acts {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.8rem;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
          }
          .act-pill {
            font-size: 0.6rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 0.3em 0.9em;
            border-radius: 20px;
            border: 1px solid;
          }
          .act-pill.act1 { color: #7C3AED; border-color: rgba(124,58,237,0.35); background: rgba(124,58,237,0.08); }
          .act-pill.act2 { color: #06B6D4; border-color: rgba(6,182,212,0.35); background: rgba(6,182,212,0.08); }
          .act-pill.act3 { color: #10B981; border-color: rgba(16,185,129,0.35); background: rgba(16,185,129,0.08); }

          @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;600&display=swap');

          /* Entrance animation */
          @keyframes fadeUp {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
          }
          .badge    { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.1s both; }
          h1        { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.2s both; }
          .subtitle { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.3s both; }
          .audience { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.35s both; }
          .lang-buttons { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.45s both; }
          .divider  { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.55s both; }
          .acts     { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.6s both; }
        </style>
        <script>
          // Redirect directly to FR
          window.location.replace('fr.html');
        </script>
---

<div class="landing">
  <div class="badge">Des Prompts aux Produits · From Prompts to Products</div>

  <h1>LLMs & Agentic AI</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">
    A bilingual presentation on LLMs and Agentic AI for Product Managers.<br>
    Une présentation bilingue sur les LLMs et l'IA Agentique pour les PMs.
  </p>
  <p class="audience">Pour PMs & POs · For PMs & POs</p>

  <div class="lang-buttons">
    <a class="lang-btn btn-fr" href="fr.html">
      <span class="flag">🇫🇷</span>
      <span class="label">
        <span class="lang-code">Français</span>
        <span class="lang-name">Voir la présentation</span>
      </span>
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <div class="acts">
    <span class="act-pill act1">ACT I · La Couche Intelligence</span>
    <span class="act-pill act2">ACT II · La Couche Agentique</span>
    <span class="act-pill act3">ACT III · Agents GitLab</span>
  </div>
</div>
